name: Tomato
description: Productive in fertile soil with long sunny days. Needs support as it grows tall.

name: Zucchini
description: Fast growing and very productive. One plant can feed a family.

name: Carrot
description: Sandy loose soil lets roots grow straight and deep without deforming.

name: Potato
description: Tolerates heavy clay soil well. Very productive and easy to store.

name: Lettuce
description: Grows fast in rich soil. Ideal for beginners and small spaces.

name: Garlic
description: Plant in autumn for summer harvest. Repels many pests naturally.

name: Bean
description: Fixes nitrogen in the soil improving fertility for nearby plants.

name: Pea
description: Climbs naturally and fixes nitrogen. Great for cool early spring.

name: Spinach
description: Thrives in moist clay soil. Very nutritious and fast to harvest.

name: Kale
description: Extremely hardy. Survives frost and produces through winter.

name: Lavender
description: Attracts bees and butterflies. Thrives in dry sandy conditions.

name: Borage
description: Star-shaped blue flowers loved by bees. Also repels tomato hornworm.

name: Phacelia
description: One of the best bee plants. Fast growing and very productive flowers.

name: Sunflower
description: Tall and dramatic. Bees love the large flower heads.

name: Yarrow
description: Attracts predatory insects that eat garden pests. Extremely hardy.

name: Comfrey
description: Deep roots mine nutrients from subsoil. Leaves make excellent mulch.

name: Elderflower
description: Berries and flowers feed birds and insects. Very low maintenance.

name: Nettle
description: Host plant for many butterfly species. Edible and medicinal.

name: Wildflower mix
description: Mix of native species to support local insect populations.

name: Hawthorn
description: Berries feed birds through winter. Dense thorny hedge for wildlife.

name: Oak tree
description: Supports hundreds of insect species. Very long lived and majestic.

name: Willow
description: Fast growing shade tree. Loves moist silty soil near water sources.

name: Linden
description: Fragrant flowers attract bees. Excellent shade tree for communities.

name: Alder
description: Fixes nitrogen and provides shade. Ideal near streams or wet areas.

name: Hazel
description: Produces edible nuts and creates dappled shade. Great for communities.

name: Rosemary
description: Drought tolerant aromatic herb. Adapts to most soils with good drainage.

name: Mint
description: Grows vigorously in moist soil. Plant in containers to control spread.

name: Thyme
description: Hardy aromatic herb for dry sandy soil. Very low maintenance.

name: Chamomile
description: Calming herb and excellent companion plant. Attracts beneficial insects.

name: Blackcurrant
description: Productive berry bush for fertile soil. Rich in vitamin C.
